title: btmw: Analysis code for Blue-Tilt Milky-Way simulations
description:
Analysis code that reproduces every figure in:

J. Wu, T. K. Chan, V. J. Forouhar Moreno, "Cosmological zoom-in simulations of Milky Way host mass dark matter halos with a blue-tilted primordial power spectrum", Phys. Rev. D 112, 023512 (2025). arXiv:2412.16072.

Intermediate per-figure caches are checked in so each figure can be regenerated quickly without access to the raw simulation data.

Raw simulation data are available at https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20805009.

If you use this code in your research, please cite the paper and this repository:

J. Wu, T. K. Chan, V. J. Forouhar Moreno,
Phys. Rev. D 112, 023512 (2025). https://doi.org/10.1103/59fw-974t

J. Wu, T. K. Chan, V. J. Forouhar Moreno,
btmw: Analysis code for Blue-Tilt Milky-Way simulations (2026). https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20805091

creators.name: Wu, Jianhao
